title: Build core bootstrap zip — Docker-deferred CI workflow path

docker_check.result: zsh: command not found: docker / docker not found / colima not found

deliverables.package_list: tools/scripts/m4-bootstrap-packages.txt (NEW; 7 packages: bash, zsh, coreutils-gnu, findutils, apt, pkg, git)

package_mapping_round_2_fix._codex_round1_finding: build-bootstraps.sh accepts --add for non-default packages, NOT positional args. Round-1 workflow was passing `$(cat package_list.txt)` as positional which would fail.
package_mapping_round_2_fix.default_essentials: apt, bash, coreutils, findutils, plus termux-tools (provides `pkg`) — per termux-packages/scripts/build-bootstraps.sh:425-454
package_mapping_round_2_fix.name_normalization: coreutils-gnu (ralplan canonical) → coreutils (termux-packages canonical); -gnu suffix stripped at CI

blockers: Docker/colima unavailable on Mac dev machine (verified by lead)
Bootstrap zip artifact production deferred to GitHub Actions ubuntu-latest runner
Workflow trigger: manual via 'workflow_dispatch' OR push to .github/workflows/build-bootstrap.yml
next_steps_for_m4_s04_consumer: Run workflow: gh workflow run build-bootstrap.yml -f arch=aarch64
Wait for green run: gh run list --workflow=build-bootstrap.yml --limit=1
Download artifact: gh run download <run-id> -n bootstrap-aarch64
Use bootstrap-aarch64.zip + bootstrap-metadata.json for M4-S04 Gradle copy task

ac1_run_build_bootstraps_sh.reason: Docker not available locally; workflow encodes the build invocation

ac2_artifact_path_documented.evidence: expected_artifact.name = bootstrap-aarch64.zip; produced into termux-packages/ in CI runner

ac3_sha256_recorded.reason: Hash computed by CI step 'Verify zip artifact'; emitted in bootstrap-metadata.json

ac4_docker_unavailable_handled.evidence: ci_workflow + docker_check both present; honest deferral

gate.criteria: ci_workflow present AND package_list present AND docker_check honest AND artifact deferred to CI not faked
